#CNXMETAL Price is now approaching a major double support zone!!! A strong bounce from this area is important to keep the broader uptrend structure intact!!! As of now, the index has largely respected the expected path, with only minor changes in the lower-degree counts!! If this support zone holds, the probability increases for the next leg higher, potentially marking the start of the 5th wave up!!

Posted the #Gold and #Silver analysis in the morning when prices were near support and RSI was deeply oversold!! The bounce we are seeing was anticipated, though it may still turn out to be just an oversold bounce. A sustained move above the previous swing high would strengthen the case for a trend change!! Charts often provide valuable clues and can be right many times, but no setup is guaranteed!! The real edge comes from patience, discipline, proper risk management, and knowing when to enter

The entire financial analyst Buggy divided into two camps right now. One group expects a strong rally in Silver from these levels, while the other expects a deeper correction. I am the middleman 🥸 serving water to both the Camps !! You can never sell at the exact top, someone will always give you a higher target like ₹7 lakh Similarly, you can never buy at the exact bottom, because that's when pessimism is at its peak. My #investment rule is simple: Buy when fear dominates. Sell when every

LAVE Zone in #Smallcap Index Multiple resistance in this 5% zone, it will not be easy to break this.. It need push from broader indices, that is what actually happening ... You should not chase breakout in this Market, better sell at resistance and buy near support.. Change the gear from 4th to 2nd..rest control with clutch !! #DARVAS 🥸
I will start buying more #Silver at trend reversal.. $54-57 must be good reversal zone !! Disc:- I don't trade Silver/gold ,buy them for investment purpose !! #DARVAS 🥸

#GENUSPOWER Yesterday was the breakout day, and today looks like a retest day. If this retest holds, the uptrend may continue from here!! Retests after breakouts are a normal part of price action and often provide clarity on the strength of the move!! Let's see how price behaves around this zone!! #GENUSPOWER

No need to worry , if your portfolio not moving from last 2-3 days. Nifty/Bank Nifty and many other indices are doing gud, that a good sign, How I think , if my smallcap not working in such situation, my Mutual funds doing gud !! Smallcap without Nifty strength have no meaning... #DARVAS 🥸
